subject: [PATCH v5 1/9] mm: list_lru: fix set_shrinker_bit() call during race with cgroup deletion

2026-05-27.patch_summary: This patch fixes a long-standing bug in the list_lru code that causes the shrinker bit to be set on the wrong cgroup when there is a race between adding an object to the list and deleting the cgroup. The fix involves returning the effective memcg from the locking function, which allows the caller to use it instead of the original memcg. This change ensures that the shrinker bit is set correctly even in the presence of concurrent cgroup deletions.
